name: Music Talent Studio
gate_blockers: Audio analysis approach not confirmed (third-party API vs. custom model)
Talent assessment framing — must not harm students emotionally
Industry professional network needed for mentor matching layer
assertions: Song-first learning increases student retention vs. theory-first approaches
Rate of improvement is more predictive of potential than current ability level
No existing platform bridges instruction + AI analysis + talent discovery + industry pipeline
anti_drift_notes: Talent assessment must be framed as 'development stage' not 'gifted/not gifted'
Teachers are partners not disruption targets — positioning is critical
Do not reproduce copyrighted songs — analysis and technique extraction only
Recording consent and data retention policy required before audio features launch
Rate of improvement metric is a core differentiator — protect in all feature decisions
decision_debt: Audio analysis tech stack — Whisper alone or music-specific model?
Copyright strategy for song-based learning — need legal review
Industry scouting launch strategy — chicken/egg: need artists before scouts, scouts before artists
Teacher monetization model — platform fee vs. Stripe Connect passthrough
Talent evaluation pricing — per submission vs. subscription
candidate_concepts: Recording studio booking and session workflow
Performance preparation (audition prep, stage fright coaching)
Artist brand and social presence builder
change_notes: 2026-04-04: Expanded vision (soul language framing), Song-First Learning (3 songs, backward curriculum), Real-Time AI Session Loop, Composer/Songwriter talent track, GarageBand Creation Marketplace, Teacher Business Infrastructure, Teacher Self-Care (music studio)
